label: Smart Engine Sim v6 (Fast UI)
info: v6 Workflow with 1s triggers and engine-specific buffers.

name: Simulate 14 ML Features & UI
Buffer 30 Cycles per Engine
Format Log Request
func: try { let prediction = JSON.parse(msg.payload); msg.payload = { engineId: parseInt(msg.engineId), engineName: msg.engineName, alert: prediction.alert === true, rulCycles: prediction.rul_cycles || 0 }; msg.headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json" }; return msg; } catch(e) { return null; }
